text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The last stage of my first three years with Gold
Ship has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time to conquer the Arima Kinen has arrived
once again.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Unlike a race, life isn't a clear shot to the end.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's got mountains to climb, valleys to cross, rivers
to raft, and in the end, it all leads to the ocean.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, gravity might get thrown out of
whack and fling you into outer space.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But that's no biggie. The water cycle never sleeps,
and that means you'll always end up in the ocean
again, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Um, what the heck are you going on about?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps that speech is Golshi's way of expressing
enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Holy tectonics! Didn't expect you both here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If we compare today's race to Earth's topology,
it'd be on the scale of a huge mountain―no! It'd
be up there with the Japanese Alps!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I'll conquer it just the same. Just like I'll
conquer the two of you and return to the ocean!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Our rivalry and the battles it has yielded have
been pivotal in my own personal growth.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I shall bring the fruits of my labor to bear in
today's race.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And just FYI, I'm, like, a whole new Umamusume
compared to before.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so absolutely, totally, one hundred percent
winning today!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! The fire burning inside you both is hot
as magma, and I'm right there with you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Let's burn the track so hot it melts into lava!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtains rise on the ultimate race of the
Twinkle Series!
